---
title: "Packages"
description: "The EpiAware ecosystem — small, composable packages that combine into infectious disease models."
listing:
  id: package-listing
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  sort: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: true
---

Each package does one thing and combines with the others. Most extend Julia's
[Distributions.jl](https://github.com/JuliaStats/Distributions.jl) so they share
a common interface and compose cleanly. Read any package's documentation in the
[unified docs browser](../docs.qmd), or follow the links on each page below.

::: {#package-listing}
:::

## Adding a package

The list above is generated automatically from the pages in `packages/`. To add
a package, copy `packages/_template.qmd` to `packages/<yourpackage>.qmd`, fill in
the front matter and body, and open a pull request — the card and its docs entry
appear on build. See [Contributing](../contributing.qmd) for details.

::: {.callout-note}
Empty or placeholder ("shell") repositories are intentionally left off this list
until they have real, documented functionality.
:::
